title: Assertion failure in gdk_group.c after adding a unique constraint to a table
poc: create table atacc1 ( test int, test2 int);
alter table atacc1 add constraint atacc_test1 unique (test, test2);
key_bug_features: Adding unique constraint to a table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE atacc1 (test INT, test2 INT, test3 VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO atacc1 (test, test2, test3) VALUES (1, 2, 'value1');
INSERT INTO atacc1 (test, test2, test3) VALUES (1, 2, 'value2');
ALTER TABLE atacc1 ADD CONSTRAINT atacc_test1 UNIQUE (test, test2);
SELECT * FROM atacc1 WHERE test3 IS NOT NULL;
